image_engine.role: Concept images, style sheets, game asset images, UI/key art exploration

video_engine.role: Blender MCP orchestration, UE5 FBX game asset pipeline, validation, capture/video assembly

blender_mcp.role: 3D creation, modification, screenshots, export through video-engine

world_model.scale_rule: The world is so large that no traveler can see the end; horizons resolve into haze, glare, storms, mountain rings, firmament distortion, or locked routes.
world_model.game_translation: Each arena is a reclaimed Tartarian-resonance node on the huge flat world-plane. The sacred circle restores local infrastructure and true maps unlock future routes.

primary_theme_pack.role: Primary mythic alignment: luminous guardian force versus adaptive dark influence.
primary_theme_pack.translation: Light Warrior turns the pack's luminous guardian/dark AI conflict into physical arena combat where human bravery expands sacred territory.

secondary_theme_packs.role: Sacred temple architecture, luminous stone, ritual audio, and resonance technology.
Restored nodes, geometry as circuitry, dormant structures reactivating, and visible reclaimed infrastructure.

theme_alignment.theme_rule: New characters, levels, weapons, enemies, and systems must reinforce light, darkness, bravery, human agency, temple risk, territory restoration, Old Earth node infrastructure, or true-map route discovery.

lila_alignment.tight_loop: The player chooses danger, restores the field, and sees the world answer with expanded light, clearer perception, and working Old Earth infrastructure.
lila_alignment.ai_role: The Luminous Witness is the temple field speaking through bounded verbs after authored fallback proves the loop.

progression_systems.cause_effect_rule: Every resource, enemy, weapon, and upgrade must have a visible cause and a visible world effect.
progression_systems.lesson_rule: The player feels the law through action first; names and recaps arrive after the effect is understood.

ai_features.player_value: Help the player recognize that brave action expands the light without solving combat.

lines: The dark field is taking ground.
The field is not lost. Rise and reclaim it.

quality_bar.primary_reference: Hades arena readability plus Vampire Survivors pressure
quality_references: Hades for readable arenas and dash-attack rhythm
Kena: Bridge of Spirits for bright heroic magical combat
Risk of Rain 2 for escalating survival pressure
quality_bar.obvious_improvement: Make bravery visible by turning player courage into reclaimed sacred territory.
quality_bar.new_hook: Bravery expands the light: weapon temples pull the player out of safety, reward the risk with power, and push the sacred circle outward.
quality_bar.full_game_vision: An epic third-person arena action game about reclaiming sacred Old Earth nodes from living darkness with weapon temples, heroic VFX, true-map route discovery, replayable arenas, and controller-first combat.
staged_expansion_plan: First playable: movement, dash, light strike, sacred circle, run timer, result state, and two enemies.
Vertical slice: one polished Old Earth node arena with Thunder Hammer temple and a 90-second wave.
Combat expansion: four weapon temples, enemy families, and elite variants.
Progression: unlockable blessings, arena modifiers, and mastery ranks.
Campaign structure: multiple corrupted sanctuaries and boss encounters.
Launch candidate: controller polish, settings, saves, performance, trailer, and Steam page.
quality_bar.vertical_slice_target: One polished UE5 arena with final-direction movement, camera, lighting, VFX, audio, combat, and 30-second gameplay proof.
quality_bar.true_signal: A target player voluntarily leaves the safe light circle to reach the temple weapon, then understands that brave action expanded the light.

pincus_pattern.proven: Hades arena readability plus Vampire Survivors pressure
pincus_pattern.better: The defended sacred circle changes dynamically based on combat
pincus_pattern.new: Weapon temples pull the player out of safety
pincus_pattern.signal: 30-second capture proves dash, strike, temple, and light expansion

build_purpose.question: Does the sacred-circle temple risk/reward loop read quickly enough to justify UE5 production?

better_claims.player_pain: Arena action games often use the arena as a static backdrop.
better_claims.improvement: The sacred light circle visibly expands and shrinks based on player courage and combat success.
better_claims.first_five_minutes_proof: The first enemy kill expands the circle, and leaving safety creates understandable health pressure.

new_hooks.primary: Weapon temples sit outside the safe circle, forcing brave movement into darkness for temporary power spikes.
fallbacks: Light trails create temporary safe paths after brave routes.
Enemies corrupt the circle edge and force the player to cleanse breach points.

design_foundation.player_instinct: The player wants to feel brave by stepping out of safety, striking darkness, and seeing the world brighten because they acted.

minimum_viable_idea_state.artifact: Throwaway Three.js mechanic sketch plus 10-second and 30-second captures.
minimum_viable_idea_state.question: Do players understand that bravery expands the light through safety, temple risk, combat success, and visible territory gain?
minimum_viable_idea_state.maximum_time_to_expand: Do not add more browser systems before UE5 setup unless they directly inform first-10-second readability.

first_time_player_experience.first_reward: A shadow enemy bursts into light and the sacred circle expands.
first_time_player_experience.bold_beat: Thunder Hammer slam clears enemies and expands the circle.

player_trust.player_thank_you: Players will thank the game for making bravery obvious, fair, and rewarding.
must_not_break: enemy tells stay readable through VFX

distribution_strategy.first_100_players: Private itch/Steam playtest after UE5 vertical slice signal.
distribution_strategy.traveling_asset: A 30-second clip showing leaving safety, claiming Thunder Hammer, and expanding the light.

kill_criteria.weak_signal: Three of five target players do not voluntarily risk the temple after two runs.
